debug_info.goal:
α : Type u_1
β : Type u_2
G : Graph α β
x : α
h : (x : α) → @Graph.inessential α β G x
hx : x ∈ G.vertexSet
⊢ ¬Matroid.IsColoop (@Graph.matchingMatroid α β G) x

failed_attempts:
obtain ⟨M, hM, hnot⟩ := h x
  rw [Matroid.isColoop_iff_forall_mem_base]
  push_neg
  have h_loopless : ∀ e ∈ E(G), ∀ v, V(G, e) = {v} → M.encard = ⊤ := by
    intro e he v hv
    obtain ⟨M', hM', hv'⟩ := h v
    by_contra hfin
    have h_aug : G.IsMatching (insert e M') := ⟨insert_subset he hM'.subset, by
      rintro f (rfl | hf) g (rfl | hg) -
      · contradiction
      · rw [hv]; exact disjoint_singleton_left.mpr (hM'.subset_vertex_of_mem hg)
      · rw [hv]; exact disjoint_singleton_right.mpr (hM'.subset_vertex_of_mem hf)
      · exact hM'.disjoint hf hg ‹_›⟩
    have := hM'.max _ h_aug
    rw [encard_insert, ENat.add_one_le_iff] at this
    · exact this (ne_top_of_le_ne_top hfin (hM.max _ hM'.toIsMatching)) rfl
    intro heM
    exact hv' <| hM'.subset_vertex_of_mem heM (by rw [hv]; rfl)
    
  have h_base : G.matchingMatroid.Base V(G, M) := by
    rw [Matroid.base_iff_maximal_indep]
    refine ⟨⟨M, hM.toIsMatching, rfl.subset⟩, fun I ⟨M', hM', hI⟩ hsub ↦ ?_⟩
    by_cases hfin : M.encard = ⊤
    · rw [hfin] at hsub
      have : M'.encard ≤ ⊤ := le_top
      -- If infinite, size comparisons are trivial or tricky; assuming finite context mostly
      exact hsub
    · have h_no_loop (e : β) (he : e ∈ E(G)) (v : α) : V(G, e) ≠ {v} := 
        fun heq ↦ hfin (h_loopless e he v heq)
      have card_eq (K : Set β) (hK : G.IsMatching K) : V(G, K).encard = 2 * K.encard := by 
        -- Justification: V(G, K) is union of disjoint sets of size 2
        sorry 
      rw [card_eq _ hM.toIsMatching, card_eq _ hM'] at hsub ⊢
      gcongr
      exact hM.max _ hM'
      
  exact ⟨V(G, M), h_base, hnot⟩
